ModMetaData.name: VQE Generator (HSK/CE Patched)
ModMetaData.author: Oskar Potocki, Sarg Bjornson, Taranchuk, Bread mo — HSK/CE patch by CarbineAction
ModMetaData.description:
HSK/CE-patched standalone version of Vanilla Quests Expanded — The Generator, tuned for the Hardcore SK modpack.
This bundles the upstream VQE Generator mod content with HSK conventions and Combat Extended patches baked in. Do NOT enable the Steam Workshop version of VQE Generator alongside this — they would duplicate each other's defs.
HSK/CE patches included: - Material swaps on all 16 ARC genetrons (Basic, Wood-fired ×4, Chemfuel ×4, Geothermal ×4, Nuclear ×4) and 7 ruined ancient ARC structures so deconstruction returns HSK-native refined materials: * Steel → SteelBar * Uranium → DepletedUranium * Gold → GoldBar (HSK refined alloy) - Plasteel / ComponentSpacer / ComponentIndustrial left as-is (already HSK-native) - HSK CE armor rescale on the Ancient Tight Parka (Sharp 8 / Blunt 4 + Bulk 4.0 / WornBulk 1.4).
Original mod by Oskar Potocki, Sarg Bjornson, Taranchuk, Bread mo. HSK/CE conversion by CarbineAction.
Required: Hardcore SK, Combat Extended.
